title: Agent Toolkit Local Config
description: Per-developer, gitignored configuration for pinning provider identities in a project. Place as .agent-toolkit.local.json in the project root.

identity.description: Pin which account/identity to validate per provider. Keys must match a server declared in .agent-toolkit.json.

GitHubIdentity.description: Expected GitHub identity for this project.

account.description: GitHub username expected to be authenticated (e.g., 'octocat').

GcpIdentity.description: Expected GCP identity for this project.

account.description: GCP account email expected to be active (e.g., 'user@example.com').

TerraformIdentity.description: Expected Terraform Cloud identity for this project.

host.description: Terraform Cloud/Enterprise host to authenticate against (e.g., 'app.terraform.io').

email.description: Terraform Cloud account email expected to be authenticated (e.g., 'user@example.com').

AtlassianIdentity.description: Expected Atlassian identity for this project.
